My Best Friend's Girl (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,219,250Details
International Box Office $15,567,861
Worldwide Box Office $34,787,111
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $20,180,303
Total $20,180,303
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,265,357 (43.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.33 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:55.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,604 opening theaters/2,636 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $32,014,241

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 19th, 2008 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: January 13th, 2009 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong language and sexual content throughout, including graphic dialogue and some nudity.
Running Time: 101 minutes
Plot point: Love Triangle, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Tricked into a Relationship
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, Management 360, Terra Firma Films, Superfinger Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
